commentaries.author: Anselm of Laon
commentaries.content: Amen. This is a Hebrew word of affirmation.

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: and priests. there is not one of the saints who has not spiritually the office of priesthood, in that he is a member of the eternal Priest.

commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: And now made a priest of God over them, and the same their minister has acknowledged it.

commentaries.author: Nerses of Lambron
commentaries.content: So at the end of this section glory is befitting to Him who brought us to this honor and created so much grace. For we have nothing else to give in exchange, except only glory.

commentaries.author: Nerses of Lambron
commentaries.content: made us a kingdom: He made us kings through hope according to the undying promise, because if we endure we shall reign with Him.

commentaries.author: Nerses of Lambron
commentaries.content: and priests. in that we continually offer to Him the rational sacrifice of thanksgiving and blessing, heeding the advice, ‘Offer to God a sacrifice of blessing’ instead of irrational sacrifices:

commentaries.author: Nicholas of Lyra
commentaries.content: made us a kingdom. That is, to be written as citizens of the kingdom of Heaven.

commentaries.author: Oecumenius
commentaries.content: and priests. For this is even greater and more miraculous than washing away our sins in His own blood, and is worthy to be called the gift of God, there has not been another kind of offering beforehand such as our empowering to be priests and prophets of God, this is a valuable gift.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content:
Are not even we laics priests? It is written: "A kingdom also, and priests to His God and Father, hath He made us.".
Have put on Christ"-has made "priests to God His Father"

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: That is to say, a Church of all believers; as also the Apostle Peter says: A holy nation, a royal priesthood. 1 Peter 2:9

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: and priests. That is to say, a Church of all believers; as also the Apostle Peter says: "A holy nation, a royal priesthood.(1 Peter 2:9)"
